# Paths to exclude from secret scanning
# (test fixtures, example configs, lock files)
.git/
node_modules/
.env.example
dashboard/nextjs/.env.example
package-lock.json
.*\.lock$
__pycache__/
.*\.pyc$
coverage.xml
test_results.txt
.github/workflows/ci.yml
tests/unit/test_telegram_alerts.py
tests/test_ws_auth_guard.py
